titleStmt.title: SII 34.168: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 168. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock outside the west prākāra wall of the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: This records a sale of land for offerings to the temple of Kuṉṟam-uḍaiyār, by the sabhā of Vallada-maṅgalam a brahmadēya in Mīkōṭtu-nāḍu, a unit of Kēraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumani vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum pOṟcayappāvaiyum cīrtaṉiccelviyum taṉ peruntEviyarāki Inpuṟa neṭutu
yil Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarpanavēli paṭarvanavāciyu cuḷḷi cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkamum naṇṇar karumuraṇ
r tammuṭiyumāṅkavan tēviyarōṅkeḻil muṭiyum munnavan pakkal tennavan vaitta cuntiran muṭiyum
kēraḷan muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir
peruṅkāval palapaḻantīvu ceruviṟ ciṉavilirupattorukāl Aracu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracirāmaṉ mēl varum cāntimaṟṟīvaraṇ ka
ṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta jayaciṅkaṉ naḷapperum pukaḻḻōṭu pīṭiyil liraṭṭapāṭi Ē
ḷum vikkiramavīrar cakkarakōṭṭamum mutirpaṭaval matiraimaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷaiy nāmaṇaikkō
yum pācaṭaip paḻaṉa mācuṇitēcamum Ayarvil vaṇ kīṟtti Ātinakar Avaiyil cantiraṉ ṟol taṉai viḷai yemarkaḷat
yōṭum piṭittu palar tanattōṭu niṟai kulataṉakuvaiyum kiṭṭarum viṣaiyamum vemmu
ṉaiyaḻittu veṇṭuṟai cōlait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākkit tikkaṇai mum kōvinta can
māviḻintōṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatēcamum toṭuka mayipālaṉai veñcamar taruḷiyoṇṭiṟal
yāṉaip peṇṭirp paṇṭāramum nittala neṭuṅkaṭalu veṟipuṉartīrta teṟipunaṟkaṅkaiyum
lakalañ celutticaṅkirāma vijayattuṅkapanmanākiya kiṭārat tarayaṉai vākaya
makappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamum Ārttavanakanakar pōrttoḻi
moyttoḷirp puṉaimaṇip putavamum kanamaṇikkatavamum niṟaiñcīr vijayamum tu
yiṟṟon malaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻmāyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācō
māpappāḷamum kāvalpuka mēvilippaṅkamum viḷaippantūruṭai vaḷayapaintū
takkōlamum tītamāvalpukaḻmātamāliṅkamum kalāmutirk kaṭuntiral Ilāmūritēcamum tēnakkavār poḻilmānakkavāramum
kaṭalkāval kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramu māpporutaṇṭār koṇṭa kōpparakēcaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājēntracōḻadevarkki yāṇṭu
tu kēraḷāntakavaḷa nāṭṭu mīkōṭṭunāṭṭu brahmadeyam vallatamaṅkalattu sabhaiyōm Ināṭṭukku
tiruvāṭppōkki mahādeva mūlabhṛttaṉnāṉa śaṇḍeśvaradevarkku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili tēvatāṉamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūr kīḻppula karavatikku kiḻakku
kālukku vaṭakku mūṉṟāñcaturatil vaṭakkil Araiyil nāṅkaḷ Ittēvarkku muṉ kuṭutta nilam kālum nīkki niṉṟa kālum Ittēvarkku ṉmāṇikkattē
ṇṭavilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu nalkācu 4 10 5 Ikkācu nāṟpattañcilum Inilam kālukku ṟak koṇṭakācu
kāvalāk koṇṭakācu 4 10- m Āka ttaiñcum Āvaṇakkaḷiyilēy kaiykkoṇṭuṭai
Iṟaiili tēvatāṉamāka viṟṟu vilai Āvaṇañ devarkku valivatamaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyōm
Innilam kkunṟam Uṭaiyārkku Artdhayāma sandhikku yaḻākkum neyyamutu
ṉṟukku nellu kuṟuṇi ñāḻi Uḻakkāka
paṉmāyē
Digital edition of SII 34.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
